note: SYNTHESIZED from docs/research/spreset-behavior-2026-07-17.md §MacroNest (clean-room; no SPreset source read). Prose is RPT-authored + scrambled; no ST default utility strings. MacroNest gates RECURSIVE innermost-first macro expansion (spec:523-566). RPT maps this onto its multi-pass macro engine (issue 13): `MacroNest:true`/absent keeps RPT's default nesting cap (a macro whose expansion is itself a macro resolves inside-out); `MacroNest:false` runs a SINGLE non-nesting pass, leaving an inner macro literal — matching SPreset's original shallow substituteParams. The true-vs-false pass-count divergence and the inside-out resolution are pinned directly by test/spreset.test.ts (they need a seeded chat var, which the conformance fixture schema has no channel for). This fixture pins the simpler surface: a MacroNest-carrying preset assembles and its core macros expand ({{char}} → the card name). Structural-only until the conformance adapter is wired.

input.description: Preset with SPreset MacroNest:true and a system prompt embedding core macros; asserts the macro engine ran.

character.name: Vael
character.description: Vael, keeper of the tide-glass at Sill.

mustContain: Summon Vael and hold the lantern-oath.

chat.content: Summon Vael and hold the lantern-oath.
Vael, keeper of the tide-glass at Sill.
